candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total line.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; valid fallback if primary label changes across years.
Not revenue; COGS line.
Cost component, not revenue.
Cost component, not revenue.
COGS label, not revenue.
Revenue-like but non-GAAP; less preferred than reported revenue.

variables.notes: Use reported GAAP revenue first; Total Revenue is a duplicate/fallback label.

candidates.why: Direct reported COGS/cost of sales line; preferred over components and duplicate synonym.
Component of cost of sales, not full COGS when total line exists.
Duplicate synonym of total COGS with identical values; good fallback.
COGS component only; exclude when total COGS exists.
COGS component only; exclude when total COGS exists.

variables.notes: Use total Cost of sales first; Cost of revenues/COGS is an identical fallback label.

candidates.why: Explicit operating overhead line, populated, strongest SG&A candidate.
Small apparent component/subline within SG&A, not broad enough alone.
Overhead bucket/component within SG&A.
Can be SG&A-related overhead, but may already be embedded in SG&A so risk of double count.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears empty in preview; per rules include with populated overhead row for coverage across years.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in preview, so included together with the populated overhead bucket per hierarchy rule (b). Avoided smaller subcomponents and share-based compensation to reduce double counting.

candidates.why: Only clear R&D expense line; appropriate reported/supplemental expense label.
Balance sheet asset/development inventory, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset/development inventory, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the only explicit R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; preferred.
Specific component of interest expense only; not preferred as main line.
Contra/adjustment, not expense line to use as XINT.
Semantically relevant fallback, but preview is empty and less precise than explicit interest expense.
Direct interest expense fallback label; preview empty but semantically correct.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest component only; not full interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list for single interest-expense concept across label changes; excluded lease-specific and capitalized-interest component lines from final selection.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences attributable to equity holders
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holders
candidates.why: Income measure, not book equity.
Not shareholders' equity.
Not book equity line.
Only actual balance-sheet equity total available; however it includes non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is available on the balance sheet. Per rule, use Total Equity for BE and set MIB to [] to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: OCI attribution component, not minority interest balance.
Correct balance-sheet minority interest line, but would double count because BE uses Total Equity.
Correct balance-sheet minority interest synonym, but would double count because BE uses Total Equity.

variables.notes: Set to [] because BE uses 'Total Equity', which already includes non-controlling interests. This avoids double counting in BE + MIB.
